title: Check the last date to change or cancel a car driving test
body: "Since 8 April 2025, the Driver and Vehicle Standards Agency has required learner drivers to give 10 full working days’ notice to change or cancel their car driving test without losing the test fee.  This has increased from 3 full working days of notice.  The new rule is only for car driving tests - other types of driving test are not affected.  Find out more about the changes.  To help learner drivers and driving instructors through this change, you can view tables of old and new deadlines to change or cancel a car driving test up to the end of June 2025.  April 2025  Driving tests before 12 April 2025 will not be affected by the change in the rule.
